text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 42 

IMG_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Imaging Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of coinsurance and deductible payments for imaging services (IMG) for a given 
year. The total beneficiary payments are calculated as the sum of LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + 
LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the relevant lines. 

Claims for imaging procedures are a subset of the claims, and a subset
